diagnostic: Standardization for acquisition is cosmetic surgery. Continuous operational integrity is structural health. Value investing principles pay a premium for the latter and discounts the former. Business Infinity builds the latter.
answer: Standardization for acquisition is cosmetic surgery. Continuous operational integrity is structural health. Value investing principles pay a premium for the latter and discounts the former. Business Infinity builds the latter.
description: Operational debt exposure — tribal knowledge, undocumented dependencies, spaghetti logic. One bad due diligence report kills a nine-figure deal.
symptom: A potential lead investor asks a deep question about infrastructure integrity, and the founder has to wait three days for an answer.
